prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic triple-portrait composite of a beautiful young South Asian woman standing outdoors on a small square wooden floating dock in the middle of a calm lake. She wears a dusty pink oversized button-up shirt, white slim pants, white sneakers, and transparent round eyeglasses. Her hair is dark brown to black, tied in a high ponytail with loose face-framing strands. The composition contains exactly three portraits of the same woman: one full-body central figure standing on the dock with feet apart and hands gently clasped near her waist, one large semi-transparent black-and-white background profile portrait on the left facing right with her ponytail visible, and one large semi-transparent color portrait on the right in side profile facing left, wearing glasses and the same dusty pink shirt. Set the scene on a misty mountain lake with soft rippled water, blurred green hills in the background, muted natural colors, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy double-exposure effect where the two large portraits fade into the lake and fog. Use soft overcast daylight, realistic fabric texture, natural skin tones, subtle reflections on the water, and a high-resolution editorial portrait look. Keep the dock centered in the lower third, the central standing figure slightly below center, the grayscale portrait filling the left half, and the color side portrait filling the right half. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
